summary: Comprehensive testing of Options Chain, Earnings Calendar, and Supply Chain features. Backend: 100% pass (16/16 tests). Frontend: All new components working - Options Chain displays on Quote page, Earnings Calendar with region filters functional, Supply Chain with yfinance fallback working.

issues: Shows 0 events with 30-day default - need to use 60 days to see earnings (events start in April 2026). This is expected behavior based on real earnings data.

passed_tests: API /api/options/expirations/AAPL - Returns list of expiration dates
API /api/options/expirations/INVALID123 - Returns 404 for invalid symbol
API /api/options/chain/AAPL?expiration={date} - Returns calls and puts data with strike, bid, ask, IV, OI
API /api/options/chain includes underlying_price field
API /api/earnings/calendar - Returns earnings events structure
API /api/earnings/calendar?days=60 - Returns earnings events (GS, JPM, WFC, JNJ, BAC, MS, UNH, TSLA)
API /api/earnings/calendar?region=US - Region filter works
API /api/earnings/calendar?region=Europe - Region filter works
API /api/earnings/calendar?region=Asia - Region filter works
API /api/earnings/symbol/AAPL - Returns earnings for specific symbol
API /api/earnings/symbol/INVALID123 - Returns 404 for invalid symbol
API /api/supplychain/AAPL - Returns predefined supply chain (9 nodes)
API /api/supplychain/JNJ - Returns yfinance fallback data (investors + sector suppliers)
API /api/supplychain/TSLA - Returns predefined supply chain
API health check /api/ - Returns 200
API /api/market/universe - Returns US, Europe, Asia stocks
UI Navigation - Earnings link visible in sidebar
UI Earnings Page - Loads with header, stats cards, region/days filters
UI Quote Page AAPL - Loads with price chart, technical analysis, impact score
UI Options Chain - Displays on Quote page for AAPL with calls/puts tabs
UI Options Chain - Expiration select dropdown functional
UI Options Chain - Shows strike, last, bid, ask, vol, OI, IV columns
UI Supply Chain - Shows suppliers and customers tabs on Quote page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four new features tested and working: 1) Options Chain (yfinance data with 56 calls/puts for AAPL), 2) Earnings Calendar (returns events with 60+ days, cached in MongoDB), 3) Supply Chain enhanced with yfinance fallback for stocks not in predefined list, 4) WebSocket endpoint exists but uses polling fallback. Yahoo Finance API can be slow - Quote page takes 15-20 seconds to fully load.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from live sources: yfinance for options/earnings/supply chain, NewsAPI, GDELT

features_verified.options_chain: Working - Returns expiration dates and options chain with calls/puts for stock symbols
features_verified.earnings_calendar: Working - Returns upcoming earnings with region filter (US, Europe, Asia)
features_verified.supply_chain: Working - Predefined data for AAPL/TSLA/NVDA/TSM/MSFT + yfinance fallback for others
features_verified.websocket: Endpoint exists at /ws/quotes - Not tested through proxy (polling fallback available)
features_verified.navigation: Earnings link added to sidebar navigation
